name: settings-resolver
description: ADR 0037 Phase V — verification suite for the Qualia settings resolver. Exercises the live runtime to confirm the architectural invariants the ADR claims: (A) factory→profile→persona→user precedence reads through to provenance; (B) switching profiles is deterministic with no sticky state (the bug 0050 regression class); (C) declarative persona intents apply + revert cleanly without the pre-Wave-4 'mount sets, no-op disposer' footgun; (D) the `onSettingsChange` push channel fires on every resolved-state write; (E) the unified `qualia.settings` localStorage blob round-trips through reloads and the one-shot legacy migration runs cleanly. Each test isolates ONE claim — Pass = my model holds; Fail = a specific point of confusion to fix in code or docs. Ordered cheapest-first within groups, with the two reload-bearing E tests at the tail. Requires Qualia >= caa3ae0 (which introduces the four __canary hooks: setPerfSettings / untouchField / reapplyProfile / getSettingsChangeCount).
